title: Dye Depot Tab
description: uses polytone to create a creative mode tab for dye depots items
body:
This resource pack uses [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) to create a creative mode tab containing all items from [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot) and any compat items from other mods.

It is recommended to load it before joining a world already, at best directly on game start using a mod like [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi)
